title: CNBC Daily Open: Another weekend escalation in Iran, another market shrug
summary_full: Tensions in the Middle East flared again over the weekend, but markets appeared largely unfazed, with investors instead turning to a tech recovery rally.
summary_public: Tensions in the Middle East flared again over the weekend, but markets appeared largely unfazed, with investors instead turning to a tech recovery rally.
